items.title: Amazon is offering up to 50% Prime Day savings on EGO Power+ tools and lifestyle equipment – all starting from $70
items.summary:
Update 6/26: Amazon has dropped the price on the advanced lead mower bundle landing it back at its all-time lowest price for the first time since May 2025. Plus, don’t forget about the massive roundup of all the brand’s other tool deals below.

As part of the Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can find a wide array of EGO tools and lifestyle equipment getting up to 50% savings. One of the brand’s most popular lawncare solutions, the EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut Touch Drive Self-Propelled Lawn Mower with 2x 6.0Ah batteries, can be scored for $659.25 shipped during this event. Down from $879, we’ve been seeing more frequent discounts on the 2x 4.0Ah battery bundle this year (currently $20 higher in price), with this package here instead having seen a previous long-term discount to $779 and otherwise keeping to its full price. Now, you’re getting a $220 markdown off the going rate, landing it at the second-best price we have tracked – just $10 above the low we last saw in May 2025. Head below to see the entire lineup of Prime Day EGO deals while they last, and be sure to also check out our Prime Day Green Deals hub where everything is collected together.

items.title: EcoFlow expands Prime Day Sale with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus savings, FREE gifts, 3x credits, more – all from $142
items.summary:
Update 6/26: EcoFlow has dropped the FREE power bank bundle on the DELTA Pro and included it in its flash sale for $1,399 shipped going forward. The lineup of deals below the fold has been adjusted.

Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day event, EcoFlow has officially launched its full Prime Day Sale lineup with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, FREE gifts, and 3x EcoCredit rewards. You can find major deals beating out most of the 2026 sale prices we’ve seen, like the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station that gets a FREE 170W 25K power bank at $1,519.05 shipped, after using the sitewide code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, beating out the station-only Amazon offer by $65. Down from $3,699 directly, since mid-January we haven’t seen much change in price on this model, with it having jumped up to $1,599 until March when it began bouncing between $1,899 and $1,699, with occasional spikes as high as $2,599. Now, not only are you getting much more savings ($1,080 off the going rate, $2,180 off the MSRP) to the second-best price of 2026, but you also get a free RAPID 170W 25K power bank at no extra cost ($80 value). Head below to get the rundown on all the Prime Day promotions and to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: IBM Claims To Have Created World’s First Sub 1nm Chip
items.summary:

For context, the smallest chip architecture prior to IBM’s breakthrough was Intel’s 18A, which is currently being used in its Panther […]
